Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Continued To Jul-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Jessica Jiunti.

The Court granted the Ex Parte Petition for Appointment of Guardian Ad Litem (subject to review of the order). The Court also granted the Petition for Establishment of Special Needs Trust (subject to review of the order) and approved fees for Myers Urbatsch. Status on proof that the Special Needs Trust has been brought under Arizona Court supervision was set for June 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Continued To May-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
